patch_notes: Converted vocab MCQ Arabic options to English for B1 compliance (Variant A)

questions.question_text: What does 'analyze' mean in the context of AI processing data?

options.text: To store and save data for later use
To examine and study information carefully and in depth
To delete and remove data permanently
To transfer and move data from one place to another

questions.explanation_ar: analyze تعني يحلل، أي فحص المعلومات بعمق لفهم مضمونها أو استخلاص نتائج منها.

questions.question_text: Which word best describes something that is 'compelling'?

options.text: Boring and repetitive
Confusing and unclear
Persuasive, interesting, and hard to ignore
Simple and straightforward

questions.explanation_ar: compelling تعني مقنعاً وجذاباً ومثيراً للاهتمام، أي شيء يصعب تجاهله.

questions.question_text: What does 'detect' mean in 'AI can detect medical conditions'?

options.text: To treat and cure a medical condition
To prevent and stop something from happening
To discover and identify the presence of something
To cause and spread a medical condition

questions.explanation_ar: detect تعني يكتشف ويرصد، أي ملاحظة وجود شيء ما أو التعرف عليه.

questions.question_text: Students often 'encounter' difficulties when learning AI. What does 'encounter' mean?

options.text: To avoid and stay away from something
To come across and face something unexpectedly
To solve and fix a problem successfully
To ignore and pay no attention to something

questions.explanation_ar: encounter تعني يواجه أو يصادف، أي أن تأتي بالمصادفة في مواجهة شيء أو موقف.

questions.question_text: AI technology has 'emerged' as a major force. What does 'emerged' suggest?

options.text: Has always been dominant
Has recently disappeared
Has gradually come into prominence
Has been rejected by society

questions.explanation_ar: emerged يعني ظهر وبرز تدريجياً، مما يوحي بأن الذكاء الاصطناعي اكتسب أهميته بمرور الوقت.

questions.question_text: In computing, 'data' refers to raw information and facts processed by a computer.
questions.explanation_ar: صحيح. data تعني البيانات، وهي المعلومات الخام والحقائق التي تُعالجها الحواسيب.

questions.question_text: AI systems can _____ certain medical conditions with accuracy rates exceeding 95%.
questions.explanation_ar: diagnose تعني يُشخّص، أي تحديد المرض أو المشكلة بناءً على تحليل الأعراض أو البيانات.

questions.question_text: Match each English word to its correct Arabic meaning:
questions.explanation_ar: accuracy=دقة النتائج، expand=يتوسع، artificial intelligence=الذكاء الاصطناعي، human=بشري.

questions.question_text: Choose the correct sentence: Scientists are discussing AI developments.

options.text: Scientists developed AI in 2024 and it is useful now.
Scientists have developed AI tools that are widely used today.
Scientists have developed AI tools in 1956.
Scientists develop AI since the last century.

questions.explanation_ar: نستخدم المضارع التام (have developed) للتعبير عن نتيجة مستمرة حتى الآن. لا نستخدمه مع زمن محدد مثل 1956.

questions.question_text: Which sentence correctly uses the simple past?

options.text: Scientists have developed the first AI program in 1956.
IBM created Deep Blue twenty years ago.
AI technology has changed our life last year.
She has attended the AI conference in March 2023.

questions.explanation_ar: نستخدم الماضي البسيط (created) مع وقت محدد (twenty years ago). الجمل الأخرى تستخدم المضارع التام بشكل خاطئ مع أوقات محددة.

questions.question_text: Complete: 'AI technology _____ our lives dramatically.' (focus on the current result)

options.text: changed
was changing
has changed
is changing

questions.explanation_ar: نستخدم المضارع التام (has changed) للتركيز على نتيجة حدث ماضٍ مستمرة في الوقت الحالي.

questions.question_text: Which question correctly asks about someone's experience with AI?

options.text: Did you ever use AI tools?
Have you ever used AI tools?
Do you ever used AI tools?
Were you ever using AI tools?

questions.explanation_ar: نستخدم المضارع التام (Have you ever) للسؤال عن التجربة في أي وقت من الحياة، وليس الماضي البسيط.

questions.question_text: 'I have visited the AI conference last week' is grammatically correct.
questions.explanation_ar: خطأ. 'last week' وقت محدد مضى، لذا يجب استخدام الماضي البسيط: 'I visited the AI conference last week'.

questions.question_text: 'ChatGPT has become very popular since its launch' uses the present perfect correctly.
questions.explanation_ar: صحيح. نستخدم المضارع التام (has become) مع since للتعبير عن حالة بدأت في الماضي ومستمرة حتى الآن.

questions.question_text: According to Passage A, at what accuracy rate can AI diagnose certain medical conditions?

options.text: Around 80%
Exceeding 95%
Exactly 90%
Up to 75%

questions.explanation_ar: ذكر النص أن أنظمة الذكاء الاصطناعي يمكنها تشخيص بعض الحالات الطبية بدقة تتجاوز 95%.

questions.question_text: In Passage A, what is the stated purpose of integrating AI into Saudi Arabia's NEOM project?

options.text: To replace all human workers in construction
To create smart cities that anticipate residents' needs
To monitor citizens for security purposes
To reduce the cost of building materials

questions.explanation_ar: ذكر النص أن تقنيات الذكاء الاصطناعي تُدمج في التخطيط العمراني لمشروع نيوم لإنشاء مدن ذكية تستبق احتياجات السكان.

questions.question_text: What does the author of Passage A imply by saying AI identifies patterns 'that humans might overlook'? (inference)

options.text: AI is completely superior to humans in all tasks
Humans are incompetent and should be replaced by AI
AI complements human intelligence by catching details humans miss
AI was designed to find human mistakes only

questions.explanation_ar: يُضمن النص أن الذكاء الاصطناعي يُكمل القدرات البشرية، إذ يستطيع رصد تفاصيل دقيقة قد يفوت الإنسان الانتباه إليها، لا أنه يحل محله كلياً.

questions.question_text: Passage B states that over 40% of major Saudi hospitals had implemented AI technology by 2024.
questions.explanation_ar: صحيح. ذكر النص نقلاً عن إحصاءات وزارة الصحة السعودية أن أكثر من 40% من المستشفيات الكبرى نفّذت شكلاً من أشكال تقنية الذكاء الاصطناعي بحلول 2024.

questions.question_text: In Passage B, Dr. Sarah Al-Mansouri works at _____ Specialist Hospital in Riyadh.
questions.explanation_ar: ذكر النص أن الدكتورة سارة المنصوري تمشي عبر مستشفى الملك فيصل التخصصي في الرياض.

questions.question_text: Match each AI healthcare concept from the passages to its correct description:
questions.explanation_ar: flagged=يُشير إلى كأولوية، diagnose=يُشخص، implement=ينفذ، undergoing=يخضع لـ أو يمر بتحول.
